explanation: This command simulates a potential DLL injection attempt using Tracker.exe with the /d flag, which is part of the Sigma rule's detection criteria. The command is a minimal test case that matches the rule's 'CommandLine|contains: "/d"' condition.

This command uses Tracker.exe with the /c flag, which is part of the Sigma rule's detection criteria. The command is a minimal test case that matches the rule's 'CommandLine|contains: "/c"' condition.

This command simulates a potential DLL injection attempt using Tracker.exe with the /d flag. It is a simplified version of the first command, with no unnecessary elements, while still matching the Sigma rule's detection criteria.
This command uses Tracker.exe with the /d flag and omits the full path to the DLL. It still matches the Sigma rule's detection criteria while being a minimal test case.
